user.loginUser: SELECT * FROM username WHERE (username_na = $1 OR username_em = $1) AND username_pa = $2;
user.verifyUser: SELECT * FROM username WHERE (username_na = $1 OR username_em = $1);
user.registUser: INSERT INTO username (username_na, username_pa, fk_profile_id, fk_person_id, username_em) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, (SELECT person_id FROM person WHERE person_ci = $4), $5);
user.updatePassword: UPDATE username SET username_pa = $1 WHERE username_em = $2
user.getProfilesQuery: SELECT profile_id AS id, profile_na AS name FROM profile;
user.verifyDuplicate: SELECT p.person_ci, u.username_na, u.username_em FROM person AS p INNER JOIN username AS u ON p.person_id = u.fk_person_id WHERE p.person_ci = $1 OR u.username_na = $2 OR u.username_em = $3;
user.getUser: SELECT u.username_na, p.person_na, p.person_la_na, p.person_ci, u.username_em, STRING_AGG(e.enterprise_na, ', ') AS enterprises FROM username AS u INNER JOIN person AS p ON u.fk_person_id = p.person_id INNER JOIN person_enterprise pe ON p.person_id = pe.fk_person INNER JOIN enterprise AS e ON pe.fk_enterprise_id = e.enterprise_id WHERE u.username_na = $1 GROUP BY u.username_na, p.person_na, p.person_la_na, p.person_ci, u.username_em
user.updateValue: UPDATE username SET username_na = $1, username_em = $2 WHERE username_na = $3;
user.getPersonWithout: SELECT p.* FROM person p LEFT JOIN username u ON p.person_id = u.fk_person_id WHERE u.username_na IS NULL
user.getAllUsers: SELECT u.username_na, u.username_em, pe.person_ci, p.profile_na FROM username u JOIN profile p ON u.fk_profile_id = p.profile_id JOIN person pe ON u.fk_person_id = pe.person_id WHERE u.fk_profile_id != 1

tx.permsTxQuery: SELECT mp.fk_transaction_id AS tx_id, mp.fk_profile_id AS profile_id FROM method_permission AS mp;
tx.txQuery: SELECT t.transaction_id, m.method_na, o.object_na FROM transaction AS t INNER JOIN method AS m ON t.fk_method_id = m.method_id INNER JOIN object AS o ON m.fk_object_id = o.object_id;
tx.addTxPerms: INSERT INTO method_permission (fk_profile_id, fk_transaction_id) SELECT p.profile_id, t.transaction_id FROM profile p, transaction t WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM method_permission mp WHERE mp.fk_profile_id = p.profile_id AND mp.fk_transaction_id = t.transaction_id) AND p.profile_id = $1 AND t.transaction_id = $2;
tx.deleteTxPerms: DELETE FROM method_permission WHERE fk_profile_id = $1 AND fk_transaction_id = $2;

option.optionsQuery: SELECT op.option_id, op.option_na, op.option_fu, op.option_pa, op.option_as, op.option_ge, co.component_na FROM option AS op INNER JOIN component AS co On op.fk_component_id = co.component_id;
option.permsOptQuery: SELECT op.fk_option_id AS option_id, op.fk_profile_id AS profile_id FROM option_permission as op;
option.addOptPerms: INSERT INTO option_permission (fk_profile_id, fk_option_id) SELECT p.profile_id, o.option_id FROM profile p, option o WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM option_permission op WHERE op.fk_profile_id = p.profile_id AND op.fk_option_id = o.option_id) AND p.profile_id = $1 AND o.option_id = $2;
option.deleteOptPerms: DELETE FROM option_permission WHERE fk_profile_id = $1 AND fk_option_id = $2;

enterprise.registEnterprise: INSERT INTO enterprise (enterprise_na, enterprise_ri, enterprise_de) VALUES ($1, $2, $3);
enterprise.deleteEnterprise: DELETE FROM enterprise AS e WHERE e.enterprise_ri = $1;
enterprise.regisPersonEnterprise: INSERT INTO person_enterprise (fk_person, fk_enterprise_id) VALUES ((SELECT person_id FROM person WHERE person_ci = $1), (SELECT enterprise_id FROM enterprise WHERE enterprise_na = $2))
enterprise.deletePersonEnterprise: DELETE FROM person_enterprise WHERE fk_person = (SELECT person_id FROM person WHERE person_ci = $1) AND fk_enterprise_id = (SELECT enterprise_id FROM enterprise WHERE enterprise_na = $2);
enterprise.getLastid: SELECT * FROM person WHERE person_id = (SELECT MAX(person_id) FROM person);
enterprise.getPersonsEnterprise: SELECT p.person_na, p.person_la_na, p.person_ci FROM person p INNER JOIN person_enterprise pe ON p.person_id = pe.fk_person INNER JOIN enterprise e ON pe.fk_enterprise_id = e.enterprise_id WHERE e.enterprise_na = $1;
enterprise.getEnterprises: SELECT enterprise_na, enterprise_ri, enterprise_de FROM enterprise;

person.regisPerson: INSERT INTO person (person_na, person_la_na, person_ci) VALUES ($1, $2, $3);
person.getPerson: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM person WHERE person_ci = $1) THEN true ELSE false END AS person_exists;
